final:
module RefModule (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire d,
    output reg q
);
    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (enable) begin
            q <= d;
        end
        // If enable is low, q retains its previous value
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
